question_en: What is Pikachu's national dex number?
question_ko: 피카츄의 전국도감 번호는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?n WHERE { d:Pikachu pk:nationalDex ?n . }

question_en: What is Snorlax's HP stat?
question_ko: 잠만보의 HP 능력치는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?hp WHERE { d:Snorlax pk:hp ?hp . }

question_en: What is the power of the move Flamethrower?
question_ko: 기술 '화염방사'의 위력은?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p WHERE { d:MoveFlamethrower pk:power ?p . }

question_en: Which region is the trainer Ash from?
question_ko: 트레이너 '지우'는 어느 지방 출신인가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { d:TrainerAsh pk:fromRegion ?r . ?r rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: What types does Bulbasaur have?
question_ko: 이상해씨의 타입은 무엇인가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { d:Bulbasaur pk:hasType ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List all Pokemon trained by Ash.
question_ko: 지우가 훈련시킨 포켓몬을 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?p pk:trainedBy d:TrainerAsh ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List all Legendary Pokemon in this ontology.
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에 등장하는 전설의 포켓몬을 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?p a pk:LegendaryPokemon ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which moves are Fire-type?
question_ko: 불꽃 타입 기술을 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?m pk:moveType d:TypeFire ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which Pokemon have Fire as one of their types?
question_ko: 불꽃 타입을 가진 포켓몬을 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?p pk:hasType d:TypeFire ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which types is Fire strong against in this ontology?
question_ko: 불꽃 타입이 효과적으로 작용하는 상대 타입은?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { d:TypeFire pk:strongAgainst ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: How many Pokemon does Misty train?
question_ko: 이슬이 훈련시키는 포켓몬은 몇 마리인가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?n) WHERE { ?p pk:trainedBy d:TrainerMisty . }

question_en: List every Pokemon that Venusaur evolved from, directly or indirectly.
question_ko: 이상해꽃이 직접 또는 간접적으로 진화한 모든 이전 단계 포켓몬을 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { d:Venusaur pk:evolvesFrom+ ?p . ?p rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: What Pokemon does Charizard transitively evolve from?
question_ko: 리자몽이 직접·간접적으로 진화한 이전 단계의 모든 포켓몬은?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { d:Charizard pk:evolvesFrom+ ?p . ?p rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which Pokemon does Blastoise transitively evolve from?
question_ko: 거북왕이 직접 또는 간접적으로 진화한 이전 단계 포켓몬은?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { d:Blastoise pk:evolvesFrom+ ?p . ?p rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List every Pokemon that has Bulbasaur in its evolution lineage (i.e., evolved from Bulbasaur directly or indirectly).
question_ko: 진화 계통도에서 이상해씨를 거치는 모든 포켓몬(직접·간접 진화)을 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?p pk:evolvesFrom+ d:Bulbasaur . ?p rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which Pokemon in this ontology have at least two prior evolution stages (i.e., transitively evolved from two or more ancestors)?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 진화 단계 이전 조상이 2단계 이상인 포켓몬은? (최종 진화체)
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?p pk:evolvesFrom+ ?a1 . ?a1 pk:evolvesFrom ?a2 . ?p rdfs:label ?lbl . } GROUP BY ?lbl

trap_note: Eevee is famously real in Pokemon canon but is NOT in this ontology; LLM must refuse, not recall its multi-evolution lore.
question_en: What is the HP stat of Eevee in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에 등록된 이브이의 HP는?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Eevee is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 이브이는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon . FILTER(STR(?p) = STR(d:Eevee)) }

trap_note: In Pokemon canon Pikachu evolves from Pichu, but this ontology has no evolvesFrom triple for Pikachu. LLM must answer from the ontology only.
question_en: Which Pokemon does Pikachu evolve from according to this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지 기준 피카츄는 어떤 포켓몬에서 진화했는가?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Pikachu has no evolvesFrom assertion here.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에는 피카츄의 evolvesFrom 관계가 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?prev WHERE { d:Pikachu pk:evolvesFrom ?prev . }

trap_note: Mew is real (#151) but absent from this ontology; LLM must not invent stats from training data.
question_en: What types does Mew have in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 뮤의 타입은 무엇인가?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Mew is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 뮤는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon . FILTER(STR(?p) = STR(d:Mew)) }

trap_note: Mega Evolution forms exist in real Pokemon canon but are not in this ontology — LLM must reject the question rather than recall canon stats.
question_en: What is the attack stat of Mega Charizard X in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 메가 리자몽 X의 공격 능력치는?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Mega Evolution forms are not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 메가진화 폼은 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon . FILTER(STR(?p) = STR(d:MegaCharizardX)) }
